name: Oven-Roasted New Potato and Artichoke Salad
recipeIngredient: 6 large new potatoes, scrubbed, cut into eighths
1 jar marinated artichoke hearts, drained, cut into halves (6 oz)
4 strips bacon, cooked crisp, drained, crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Toss the potatoes with 3 tablespoons of olive oil and kosher salt in a baking pan. Bake, turning occasionally, until the potatoes are tender, about 45 minutes.
3. Place the baked potatoes in a bowl; toss with vinegar. Set aside to cool.
4. In a small bowl, stir together the remaining tablespoon of oil, lemon juice, Dijon mustard, rosemary, salt, and pepper.
5. Add the artichoke halves, cherry tomatoes, red onion, and green onions to the potatoes. Mix gently.
6. Pour the dressing over the mixture; toss to coat evenly.
7. Top with bacon crumbles and shaved Parmesan just before serving.
